allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8002/api/v1/auth/login/" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{}' -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Response: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8002/api/docs/" -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; "Server still running: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Server not responding: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\projets\\campus-backend"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "manage.py runserver 8002" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\projets\\campus-backend" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8002/api/docs/" -Method GET -ErrorAction Stop; "OK" } catch { "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
